name: Suspicious Curl Download
notes:
This rule detects a suspicious curl process start on Windows and outputs the requested document to a local file

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Curl.EXE Download
SIGMA Description: Detects a suspicious curl process start on Windows and outputs the requested document to a local file


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of curl.exe

when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%appdata%%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%public%%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%temp%%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%tmp%%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\desktop\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\temp\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\users\public\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\perflogs\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\programdata\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\windows\temp\%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.dll' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.gif' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.jpeg' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.jpg' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.png' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.temp' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.tmp' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.txt' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.vbe' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.vbs')) AQL filter query

when the event matches ("Parent Process File File Path"='C:\Application Files\Git\usr\bin\sh.exe' AND "Process File File Path"='C:\Application Files\Git\mingw64\bin\curl.exe' AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--silent --show-error --output %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%gfw-httpget-%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%appdata%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Curl Download on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of curl.exe

AND when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%appdata%%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%public%%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%temp%%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%tmp%%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\desktop\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\temp\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\users\public\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\perflogs\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\programdata\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\windows\temp\%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.dll' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.gif' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.jpeg' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.jpg' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.png' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.temp' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.tmp' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.txt' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.vbe' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.vbs')) AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches ("Parent Process File File Path"='C:\Application Files\Git\usr\bin\sh.exe' AND "Process File File Path"='C:\Application Files\Git\mingw64\bin\curl.exe' AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--silent --show-error --output %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%gfw-httpget-%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%appdata%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects a suspicious curl process start on Windows and outputs the requested document to a local file
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
